body.title: String/text primitives: split, regex_search, format, slice, read_chunk
body.result: Implemented: prim_str_split, prim_str_regex, prim_str_format, prim_str_slice. All registered in tool registry + seeded as PRIM_STR_* tool habits.
body.description: 5 primitives for text manipulation. prim_split(text_key, delimiter, out_key) -> list in basket. prim_regex_search(pattern_key, text_key, out_key) -> list of matches. prim_format(template_key, out_key, *slot_keys) -> formatted string. prim_slice(text_key, offset, length, out_key) -> substring. prim_read_chunk(file_key, offset_key, size, out_key) -> arbitrary file position (extends prim_read_head). Add to primitives.json and os_primitives.py or new string_primitives.py.
